prestazioni: Engine: Supercharged 6.2L GM LT4 (engine code) V8 with a custom-built Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger upgrade (12 psi boost, 1,000+ HP), paired with a reinforced 10-speed 10L90 automatic transmission featuring a Punch Powerglide billet torque converter and a TREMEC TR-9070 7-speed manual conversion option for track use.

Forced Induction: Full custom intercooler system with a Garrett dual-core air-to-water heat exchanger, integrated with a Bosch 0280158899 high-flow water pump and a Setrab Pro Series oil cooler to maintain optimal intake temps under sustained high-load conditions.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions 8-stage adjustable hydraulic lift kit (3.5-inch lift capability) with remote reservoir coilovers, paired with a custom-fabricated Rezvani-specific sway bar kit (28mm front, 25mm rear) and Eibach Pro-Truck springs for extreme articulation and rock-crawling stability. Includes a Dana 60 front axle with ARB Air Locker differential and a custom 4.88 gear ratio for low-speed torque multiplication.
estetica: Exterior: Full Rezvani Military Edition body armor upgrade with 5000-series ballistic-grade aluminum panels (0.25-inch thick) and a custom-fabricated Ram Air hood scoop feeding the Magnuson supercharger. Includes a Lazer Star 50-inch LED light bar integrated into a reinforced front bumper with a Warn Zeon 12-S winch (12,000 lb capacity) and a custom brush guard with auxiliary fog lights (PIAA LP570).

Aerodynamics: Custom Rezvani-designed rear spoiler with integrated Gurney flap (adjustable via hydraulic actuators) and a front splitter with carbon fiber dive planes (AeroCatch quick-release mounts). Includes a full underbody armor skid plate system (0.5-inch AR500 steel) with integrated rock sliders and a rear diffuser for high-speed stability.

Wheels & Tires: Method MR701 VT-Spec beadlock wheels (20x12 front, 20x14 rear) with Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires (37x13.50R20 front, 37x14.50R20 rear) and a custom air-down system (ARB Twin Air Compressor) for off-road traction optimization. Includes a Rezvani-exclusive matte military green wrap with 3M Scotchlite reflective accents for tactical visibility.
